pi_items.source: script analysis of prepare_amos_data.sh and task.json
script analysis of prepare_amos_data.sh and task.json

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated by a script. The maximum aortic diameter occurs at axial slice index 45. The expected aortic diameter is 33 mm, resulting in a cross-sectional area of approximately 855 mm². The measurement must use at least 6 control points.
